iteration_1.notes: xlsx-analyze timed out - model fetched web pages instead of doing the task. No analysis guidance in skill.

iteration_2.notes: Added Workflow B (read/analyze) with worked example and bundled script. Both tasks pass.

iteration_3.notes: Emphasized writing complete scripts in one shot. xlsx-analyze stable at 100. document-xlsx lost 7pts on LLM judge (no currency formatting).

iteration_4.notes: Added currency formatting ($#,##0) and column widths to create template. Both tasks consistently 100/100.

changes: Added Workflow B: read/analyze existing spreadsheets (was completely missing)
Added complete worked example for xlsx analysis with openpyxl
Emphasized using write tool to create complete .py files in one shot (prevents indentation errors from incremental editing)
Switched analysis example to use values_only=True for simpler tuple access
Added currency formatting ($#,##0) and column widths to creation template
Added rule about always applying currency formatting for professional quality
Removed unreferenced files: scripts/create_xlsx.py, scripts/analyze_xlsx.py, recalc.py, LICENSE.txt
